{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221906569510046F7A9214BFD497"}"},"total":56},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7568217632513737534","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"终于结束了，终于不用受 怎么（ 好突兀） ，麦迪大哥（好出戏，以为看国产武侠剧呢） ，萌神（国外还有这称呼？） ，3D（这个概念很早有，但这么频繁出现应该是克莱崛起之后吧） 这些字眼折磨了[笑][笑][笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1762123811,"group_id":"7275494995421826082","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2rxgj1PjOwe795SrsY5pNOSR2k+1WnxAiERKUGtSLXi","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1332248344276292","user_name":"喜欢石海椒的花洺海"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1332248344276292","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7275494995421826082","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越2010年，秦浩成为太阳教练，执教第一场竟然上场比赛，还贡献绝杀球，震惊整个联盟。
　　这一年。
　　勒布朗远赴迈阿密组建“热火三巨头”，“雷霆三少”露出锋芒，“黑曼巴”科比冲击第六冠。
　　“D国战车”诺维斯基进入封神年，马刺“GDP”老当益壮，绿军“五巨头”再冲总冠军…
　　而秦浩绑定“传奇球教”系统，完成任务就能获奖励。
　　【单体爆发】、【潜能激发】、【无定式投篮】、【强化电梯门】、【双鬼拍门】…
　　一个个强大奖励，不仅能提升球员能力，还能提升自身实力。
　　于是……秦浩率领通过一桩桩交易组建而成，全是年轻球员，但个个是“潜力怪”的太阳队，不断击溃东西部豪强，冲击总冠军！
　　而当球队陷入绝境时，秦浩又会自己上场，拯救球队。
　　多年以后，当秦浩成为史上最传奇的教练兼球员时，名宿们也不由感慨，“他看中并执教的球员……全是潜力怪！！！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o1eef3fd3a634dfb743656c341298024f~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"七七七琪","author_id":"","book_id":"7275494995421826082","book_name":"NBA：我能看到球员比赛状态","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182840","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":15,"name":"体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=15&name=体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7275495727441117748","read_count":"638","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"249848"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.0","serial_count":"121","tags":"游戏体育,体育,系统,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/4e57403753faf8a6a0ead0b97976e000~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779361616&x-signature=R%2F7zdUuuGshsc6LiueBOlZRewqs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3775117457","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"86"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221906569510046F7A9214BFD497"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读16小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":23858,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":56757,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":89},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7283821103020720948","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"还不错，篮球小说中比较新颖，也很纯粹，不是那些动不动就各种勾心斗角的，比赛也很干脆利落，不像一些作者动不动都巴不得每一场比赛都搞得像世纪大战一样，各种恶心反复的反转……"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1695898175,"group_id":"7275494995421826082","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一枝独秀不是春，独在异乡为异客","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4j2IhYY7rLKb7d3RLDwPps=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/5a021347e9f148fca1a03eba4df12cbd~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776707422&x-signature=Qgzx6jLsfVTrGzKSuoPYZ5qTNa4%3D","user_id":"108099803032","user_name":"第五轻柔11"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"108099803032","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7275494995421826082","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越2010年，秦浩成为太阳教练，执教第一场竟然上场比赛，还贡献绝杀球，震惊整个联盟。
